name: Invesco Galaxy Ethereum ETF
business: Invesco Galaxy Ethereum ETF (the Trust) is a Delaware statutory trust that issues common shares representing fractional undivided beneficial interest in and ownership of the Trust. The Trust's investment objective is to reflect the performance of the spot price of ether as measured using the Lukka Prime Ethereum Reference Rate, less the Trust's expenses and other liabilities. The Trust holds ether and is passively managed.
namedSuppliers: The Bank of New York Mellon

exposures.sentence: The Trust's investment objective is to reflect the performance of the spot price of ether as measured using the Lukka Prime Ethereum Reference Rate (the Benchmark), less the Trust's expenses and other liabilities.

catalysts.event: Commencement of trading on Cboe BZX Exchange
catalysts.sentence: The Trust commenced trading on the Cboe BZX Exchange, Inc. (the Exchange) on July 23, 2024.
On July 18, 2025, the GENIUS Act was signed into law, becoming the first federal law specifically regulating the issuance, custody and other stablecoin-related matters in the United States.
